declared_scope: Canonical parent baseline as of 2026-06-16: the v0.8 network + CPU stack with the Arc GPU frequency pin removed. Future candidates screen against this.
promotion_basis: Accepted promotion of candidate v0.9c-cpu-retained. Confirmed equal-or-simpler than v0.8 on the Arc desktop (both run orders) and the i5 laptop: full -51% cold-start retained on Arc, equivalent network and package power, one fewer invasive knob (GPU pin = dead weight). See CursiveResearch Chapter 16 §5.
rollback_method: Delegates to the v0.8 preset state restore via --undo; harness reverts at run end.
